name: emout-context
description: Context, workflows, and skills for emout users analyzing EMSES simulation outputs.

interface.shortDescription: User-facing guidance for loading, plotting, scripting, diagnosing, and reporting emout analyses.
interface.longDescription: Skills and bundled references for using emout with EMSES outputs: loading HDF5 grids and text diagnostics, slicing data in the correct axis order, applying SI conversion, generating and improving visualization scripts, using boundary meshes, remote_scope, remote_figure, and RemoteFigure for large HPC outputs, diagnosing common failures, reviewing analysis scripts, collecting maintainer-ready feedback, and preparing concise GitHub issues.
defaultPrompt: Create an emout visualization script for this EMSES output directory.
Diagnose this emout loading or plotting error.
Improve my emout analysis script and use remote_figure for large data.
Draft feedback for an emout bug or improvement request.
